title: Real-Time Notification Stream
description: Build a notification system using Serverpod streams to push updates to connected clients.
instructions:
Create a notification streaming system:

1. Serverpod endpoint that:
   - Provides a stream of Notification objects
   - Filters notifications by user ID
   - Supports marking notifications as read via a separate endpoint

2. Flutter NotificationService that:
   - Connects to the notification stream on app start
   - Maintains a list of unread notifications
   - Exposes a stream of notification count updates
   - Handles marking notifications as read

3. UI components:
   - Notification bell with badge showing unread count
   - Notification list screen that updates in real-time
   - Swipe-to-dismiss to mark as read

Include proper error handling and reconnection logic.

hints.text: Use Serverpod's createStream to create a stream that filters by the authenticated user.
Maintain notification state in a StateNotifier so UI can react to changes.
Consider using a BehaviorSubject or similar to always provide the current notification count to new listeners.
